# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

- NAME: Rohit Khanna
- OFFICE TELEPHONE: (202) 225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank) (File an original and 1 copy)
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ] / No [X]
- Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]
- Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)
- Stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 18 JAN 10 PM 4:18 — OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — HAND DELIVERED (For Official Use Only) — initials "MC"
- Notice: A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

Transaction grid contains only the greyed example row (JT | Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock | Sale X | 02/05/015 | 03/07/15 | B) and a handwritten/typed note across the first data row: "Please see the attached". No actual transaction rows on this page.
